seoTitle: Yardarino vs Yarloop — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Yardarino and Yarloop. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yardarino and Yarloop.
heading: Yardarino vs Yarloop — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yardarino, Western Australia and Yarloop, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarloop has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Yardarino (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yardarino or Yarloop safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yardarino has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Yarloop scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yardarino scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Yarloop scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yardarino or Yarloop?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarloop has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
